name: gatewaze-template-email
description: Gatewaze email boilerplate. React-Email project layout (emails/ + theme.ts + theme-fonts.tsx) authored in the Barebone style; cloned per-newsletter on creation. Manifest declares which platform-registry blocks are exposed in the editor palette and where the publish branch writes rendered editions.

scripts.lint: echo 'no lint configured (templates validated by gatewaze ingest + react-email render)'
